title: Hut 8 Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
text: Hut 8 Corp. Q1 2026 Earnings Report. Revenue: $71.0 million (vs. $21.8 million in Q1 2025). Net loss: $253.1 million. Adjusted EBITDA: $(250.5) million. Revenue breakdown: Power $3.7M, Digital Infrastructure $1.3M, Compute $66.0M. Cash and Bitcoin holdings: ~$1.3 billion as of March 31, 2026. Beacon Point AI Data Center: 15-year lease for 352 MW IT capacity, $9.8 billion base-term contract value. River Bend Campus: Construction advancing toward Q2 2027 delivery. Closed $3.25 billion investment-grade senior secured notes offering post-quarter. Portfolio Divestiture: Sold 310 MW natural gas power plant portfolio to TransAlta Corporation. Development Pipeline: Total 8,375 MW capacity (Under Diligence: 5,315 MW, Under Exclusivity: 1,680 MW, Under Development: 550 MW, Under Construction: 830 MW). Contracted Revenue Base: $16.8 billion triple-net, take-or-pay lease revenue. Bitcoin-backed credit facility: reduced cost from 9.0% to 7.0%. River Bend financing expected to return $184 million equity to Hut 8. CEO Asher Genoot stated: Our initial lease at Beacon Point demonstrates how our distinct power-first development model is repeatable across tenants and geographies.
